use_cases: Displaying user profile images in navigation headers or dashboards
Showing user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Representing users in contact lists or team member grids
Adding profile pictures to notification or chat interfaces
Creating user identity badges in cards or modal overlays
ai_summary: A minimalist avatar component built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images with automatic fallback support. Exports Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback subcomponents with standard Tailwind CSS styling for consistent user identity representation across any interface.
